project_type: Fullstack geospatial analytics app - Next.js 14 frontend (static export) + Azure Functions TypeScript API + ML pipeline
build_system: pnpm for both frontend and api. Frontend uses Next.js build with static export mode (output: 'export'). API compiles with tsc.
test_framework: Vitest with @testing-library/react and jsdom. Tests in frontend/__tests__/ with 25 passing tests across 5 files.
verification_instructions: 1) Run pnpm test:ci in frontend/ to verify tests pass. 2) Run pnpm build in frontend/ to verify static export succeeds. 3) Run pnpm build in api/ (tsc) to verify API compiles.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && pnpm install; cd api && pnpm install
environment_constraints: Frontend uses output: 'export' (static site generation) - no dynamic routes with path params, no server-side rendering. Use query params for dynamic pages. Map uses react-leaflet with dynamic imports (ssr: false). All dashboard routes are under app/(dashboard)/.
contribution_requirements: Keep all existing functionality working. Static fallback data must remain functional when API is unavailable. Azure OpenAI integration must gracefully degrade when env vars not set.
key_patterns: 1) Static data in frontend/lib/static-data.ts with API fetch overlay in frontend/lib/api.ts (fetchWithFallback pattern). 2) Dashboard pages in app/(dashboard)/ with glass-card styling and slate-700/800 color scheme. 3) API endpoints in api/src/functions/ register via app.http(). 4) Data loaded from CSV via api/src/data/loader.ts using papaparse. 5) Map uses dynamic import of MapInner.tsx with CircleMarker from react-leaflet. 6) Sidebar nav in components/dashboard/Sidebar.tsx with navItems array. 7) Chat panel is FloatingChatPanel.tsx using postChat from lib/api.ts. 8) Knowledge base in ml/data/knowledge_base/. 9) Kecamatan detail page uses query params (?name=&kabupaten=). 10) Theme support via CSS variables.
directory_structure: frontend/app/(dashboard)/ - dashboard pages; frontend/components/ - UI components (dashboard/, chat/, ui/, landing/); frontend/lib/ - data and utilities; api/src/functions/ - API endpoints; api/src/data/ - data loader; api/src/shared/ - shared types; ml/data/ - ML data files; docs/ - documentation
